allow: PowerShell(docker run --rm --entrypoint sh prlu/ojbench-agent-runner:latest -c "echo '=== whoami ==='; whoami; id; echo '=== /workspace ==='; ls -la / | grep -E 'workspace|home'; ls -la /workspace 2>/dev/null; echo '=== claude ==='; which claude; ls -la /usr/local/bin/claude 2>/dev/null; find / -name 'claude' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo '=== PATH ==='; echo \\$PATH; echo '=== node/npm ==='; which node; which npm; node --version 2>/dev/null")
